docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-21-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGALMATCH.COM AS TO DEFENDANT NABWANGU, FRANCOIS M.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $231.15 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT NABWANGU, FRANCOIS M.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-04-2011 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE SEP-21-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEGALMATCH.COM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NABWANGU, FRANCOIS M. $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,043.84 INTEREST, $231.15 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,074.99, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-04-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGALMATCH.COM AS TO DEFENDANT NABWANGU, FRANCOIS M. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-01-2011
